description: Create a two-column content slide on the MOOWR duty deferral opportunity in India, with a large image on the left and explanatory text on the right.

header.kicker: Insights: Europe, Middle East, India and Africa
header.headline: Duty deferred, growth unleashed – the MOOWR revolution for Make in India

left.title: Image
left.body: Warehouse scene with worker in safety vest

items.text: The Manufacturing and Other Operations in Warehouse Regulations (MOOWR), 2019, represents a cornerstone of India’s customs framework, designed to facilitate manufacturing activities within bonded warehouses.
This scheme allows businesses to import raw materials, components and capital goods without immediate payment of customs duties.
